issuesFixed.description: Card title text-header-2 resolves to 60px on desktop via responsive --text-6xl scaling, but Figma specifies 48px.
issuesFixed.fix: Added `md:text-[3rem] md:leading-[1.1]` to the h3 on line 60 of parts/card-tribe_events.php. 3rem = 48px, locking the title at the correct Figma-specified size on desktop. Mobile retains the 48px base from --text-header-2 mobile value.

issuesFixed.description: Date badge appeared at bottom-right instead of top-right. The inner frame used `flex items-end` (row direction), which pushed the badge to the bottom.
issuesFixed.fix: Changed `flex items-end` to `flex flex-col items-end` on line 37 of parts/card-tribe_events.php. With column direction, `items-end` right-aligns children and the badge naturally renders at the top of the column (first child), correctly placing it at top-right of the inner image frame.

validationResults.notes: All warnings pre-existing in other blocks. Sync warning (TSX root InspectorControls vs PHP root section) is expected for this editor-controls-only pattern.

output.screenshotNotes: 1440px screenshot confirms: date badge renders at top-right of each image frame, card titles are visibly smaller and no longer dominating the content area.
